title: Functions, Transformations, Inverses, and Composition · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Model sensor calibration and reversible conversions across representations. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a calibration and conversion library after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define function domain, codomain, range, units, and practical interpretation.
Predict how translations, scaling, reflection, and composition change a model.
Construct and validate inverses under one-to-one domain restrictions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

stimulus.title: Multi Representation case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: math intermediate functions representations. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Visual agreement at a few points proves implementations equivalent.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reconcile tables, equations, graphs, and code implementations of one function. Artifact under review: a calibration and conversion library.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Multi Representation, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Multi Representation applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Reconcile tables, equations, graphs, and code implementations of one function.
